gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 initially found that relative `shard_uri` values did not round-trip through configured disk/UC roots; the writer now uses a matching storage path resolver, regression tests were added, and GPT-5.5 approved the updated branch.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_workflow.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_kvpack.py -q -> 84 passed
what_changed: Added `DocumentKVWorkflow.with_storage(...)` to wire the standard memory, disk, and Unity Catalog reader stack with CPU/local cache settings.
Added a root-aware `write_kvpack(...)` path resolver hook so workflow cache generation and routed reads agree for relative shard URIs.
Documented the storage-wired workflow path and added disk-root/UC-root regression tests.
why: Cachet needs an intuitive end-to-end workflow API for arbitrary documents that exposes storage-agnostic Memory, Disk, and Unity Catalog loading without forcing users to assemble low-level materializer objects.
